ticket.subject: Password locked
ticket.description: I cannot login to my account; the password reset link expired. Locked out completely. Critical access issue.

ticket.subject: Invoice dispute
ticket.description: My invoice was incorrect and included wrong charges. Please process a refund. This is important to resolve quickly.

ticket.subject: New feature idea
ticket.description: Would love a bulk export enhancement added to the dashboard. Minor cosmetic suggestion for power users.
